title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his playbook for bootstrapping to $10M ARR without external funding. The discussion covers strategies for hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, reducing churn, product-led growth, SEO, pricing experiments, and when to raise capital.
